title: MoonPay Launches Open-Source Wallet Standard for AI Agents
message_html: MoonPay Launches Open-Source Wallet Standard for AI Agents ...
snippet: The payments infrastructure firm has unveiled an open-source framework enabling AI agents to manage crypto funds across multiple chains.

title: ECB says stablecoins, tokenized deposits need central bank money to scale
message_html: ECB says stablecoins, tokenized deposits need central bank money to scale ...
snippet: ECB Executive Board member Piero Cipollone said private digital money cannot scale Europe’s tokenized markets on its own, pointing to Pontes and broader legal reform as next steps.
